segments.text: So when they grab the advantage state, they rack up damage
segments.original_text: その分自分が展開取ったときのところで火力を取っていく

segments.text: They won't take risks in neutral
segments.original_text: 立ち回りでリスクを取ろうとしないっていう
安定した立ち回りに見えますね

segments.text: They're fine playing it safe unless there's a good payoff
segments.original_text: リターンを取れる状況以外はローリターンでも構わない

segments.text: But at ledge, that's where they capitalize on the advantage
segments.original_text: ただこのリターンにつながる崖展開

full_text: So when they grab the advantage state, they rack up damage They won't take risks in neutral Really solid, consistent neutral game They're fine playing it safe unless there's a good payoff But at ledge, that's where they capitalize on the advantage
